notes: Docs-only PR merge-blocker milestone. The three completed implementation features in this milestone all have empty fulfills arrays, and validation-state.json has no pending assertions left to test. No runtime setup, seeded data, or flow-validator subagents were required; validation focused on the documentation/governance surface and the changed-files coverage repro tied to the merge blockers.

fulfillsScan.observation: All three completed implementation features for docs-pr-merge-blockers (`docs-pr-merge-blockers-governance-fix`, `docs-pr-merge-blockers-changed-coverage-fix`, and `docs-pr-merge-blockers-canonical-architecture-path-fix`) have empty `fulfills` arrays.

pendingAssertions.observation: Returned `[]`; there are no pending validation-contract assertions remaining in validation-state.json.

lintKnowledgebase.observation: [ticket-parity] OK: no ticket.yaml present; skipping parity check; [knowledgebase-lint] OK

codexReviewPolicy.observation: Strict review checks ran because the branch still contains non-doc paths in scope history, then completed successfully with `[knowledgebase-lint] OK`, `[architecture-check] OK`, `[enterprise-policy] OK`, `[orchestrator-layer] OK`, and `[codex-review-guidelines] OK`.

enterprisePolicy.observation: Passed with the high-risk-path R2 controls active: `[guard_workflow_canonical_paths] OK` and `[enterprise-policy] OK`.

changedFilesCoverage.command: python3 scripts/changed_files_coverage.py --jacoco artifacts/pr-jacoco-local/jacoco-unit.xml --jacoco artifacts/pr-jacoco-local/jacoco-codered-access.xml --diff-base "$(git merge-base origin/main HEAD)" --src-root erp-domain/src/main/java --threshold-line 0.95 --threshold-branch 0.90 --fail-on-vacuous
changedFilesCoverage.observation: Passed with `changed_source_files: 0`, `files_considered: 0`, and `vacuous_reason: no_changed_source_files`, confirming non-executable module `AGENTS.md` docs are no longer treated as JaCoCo-covered runtime sources.

architecturePathCheck.observation: Only `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` exists in the docs tree; there is no lowercase `docs/architecture.md` path left competing with the canonical Linux-safe path.

r2CheckpointReview.observation: The checkpoint now references PR `#178`, narrows scope to docs-only merge remediation, explains why `erp-domain/.../AGENTS.md` matches are false-positive high-risk paths, and includes an explicit `Test Waiver` section for the non-executable markdown files.

concurrencyDecision.command: vm_stat && sysctl -n hw.memsize && ps -Ao pid,%mem,%cpu,comm | sort -k2 -nr | head -10
concurrencyDecision.observation: Host has 25.8 GiB RAM and sufficient free memory for lightweight docs validation. `.factory/library/user-testing.md` sets `docs-tree` max concurrency to 2, but zero assertion groups were produced for this milestone, so no flow-validator subagents were spawned.
